name: Customer Churn Predictor
note: Estimates based on Azure retail pricing. Actual costs depend on usage, region, reserved instances, and enterprise agreements.

services.name: Azure OpenAI
services.purpose: GPT-4o for churn intelligence — usage pattern interpretation, support ticket sentiment synthesis, billing dispute analysis, personalized retention offer generation, win-back campaign narratives

prod.note: ~1M tokens/day, gpt-4o for complex churn analysis

enterprise.note: Provisioned throughput, real-time churn scoring at scale

services.name: Azure Machine Learning
services.purpose: Churn prediction models — multi-signal scoring, usage trend analysis, engagement decay detection, lifetime value estimation, retention offer ROI optimization, segment-level risk profiling

prod.note: Managed endpoints, 4 vCPU, daily churn score refresh

enterprise.note: GPU compute, deep learning models, real-time scoring

services.name: Cosmos DB
services.purpose: Customer profiles, churn risk scores, usage telemetry aggregates, support interaction history, billing records, retention campaign results, win-back tracking

prod.note: Dedicated throughput, change feed for score updates

enterprise.note: Multi-region, analytical store for cohort analysis

services.name: Azure Communication Services
services.purpose: Retention campaign delivery — personalized SMS offers, email win-back sequences, automated callback scheduling, agent-assisted retention calls, multi-channel outreach orchestration

services.name: Azure Functions
services.purpose: Churn signal processing — usage telemetry aggregation, support ticket sentiment extraction, billing event processing, retention campaign trigger evaluation, win-back workflow orchestration

services.name: Container Apps
services.purpose: Churn prediction API — risk scoring engine, retention recommendation engine, campaign optimizer, customer health dashboard backend, cohort analysis API

services.name: Key Vault
services.purpose: CRM integration credentials, billing system API keys, communication service secrets, customer data encryption keys, ML model signing keys

enterprise.note: HSM-backed, PII data encryption key management

services.name: Application Insights
services.purpose: Churn prediction accuracy (AUC/precision/recall), retention campaign effectiveness, API latency, signal processing pipeline health, campaign delivery rates

optimization_tips: Use GPT-4o-mini for routine daily churn summaries and standard retention message generation — reserve GPT-4o for complex multi-signal churn root cause analysis and personalized high-value retention strategies, saving 65% on AI costs

Implement tiered churn scoring frequency — score high-risk customers daily, medium-risk weekly, and low-risk monthly; most customers don't change risk bands frequently, saving 80% on ML inference costs
Batch Communication Services campaign delivery during off-peak hours — SMS and email delivery is not millisecond-sensitive; scheduling during low-traffic windows reduces per-message costs
Cache customer profile aggregates in Cosmos DB with 24-hour TTL — usage patterns and support history change slowly; avoid recomputing full feature vectors on every scoring run
Use Functions consumption plan for non-time-critical signal processing (weekly cohort analysis, monthly trend reports) and reserve Premium plan for real-time churn event triggers
Set Azure Cost Management budgets with alerts at 50%, 80%, 100%
